caption: In a clothing store, a person wearing a gray baseball cap and a mauve short-sleeved t-shirt stands before a rack of apparel. The background features various clothing items, including blue shirts and hats, with "O'NEILL" logos visible on the wall and on clothing tags. The person is interacting with a black garment hanging on a rack. In the initial moments, the person stands beside the black garment, facing away from the camera. As the sequence progresses, they reach out with their right hand to touch the shoulder and collar area of the garment. They maintain this position, subtly adjusting or feeling the fabric of the black piece of clothing. The surrounding environment remains static, with neatly arranged racks of shirts and accessories filling the background.
